name: Shanghai Precise Packaging Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Precise Packaging Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells packaging machinery, integrated machinery, and three ring products in China. It offers in-line cup, full-automatic flexible packaging, full-automatic sterile flexible packaging, full-automatic sterile brick-type packaging, full-automatic UHT ultra-high-temperature tubular sterilization, sub-high-temperature sterilization, box filling, pipe sticking, hydraulic paper pushing/sterilize brick, and hydraulic paper embracing machines, as well as packaging materials. The company also provides integrated machineries, including high pressure homogenizers, spray pumps, and dispersion emulsifying machines; colloid mills and rotor pumps; plunger seal rings; homogenizing valves that are made of special ultra-hard materials; special and wear-resisting plungers; and hydraulic pressure regulating components, as well as single, double, and three-leaf pumps. In addition, it offers single-layer paddle-type stirring storage tanks, double-layer storage tanks, three-layer cold and hot tank series, SZ flash evaporation units, single-effect falling film evaporators, double-effect and multi-effect falling film evaporators, gyp drying machines, vibrated fluidized beds, power towers, cheese grooves, cheese production equipment, plate-type heat-exchange equipment, sheet bar and rubber blankets, and pasteurization machines. Shanghai Precise Packaging Co., Ltd. is based in Shanghai, China.
